tasks.label: Qemu Virt RISC-V
tasks.command: just qemu --preset qemu-virt-rv64-release --bind smp=8 --bind memory=1G --bind kernel-image=build/anemone.elf --debug | tee etc/qemu-virt-rv64.log

tasks.label: Qemu Virt Loongarch64
tasks.command: just qemu --preset qemu-virt-la64-release --bind smp=8 --bind memory=1G --bind kernel-image=build/anemone.elf --debug | tee etc/qemu-virt-la64.log
